stratagem.name: ARMOUR OF CONTEMPT
stratagem.lore: The belligerence of the Adeptus Astartes combined with their post‑human physiology makes them unyielding foes to face.
stratagem.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagem.target: One Adeptus Astartes unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagem.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagem.name: LAY LOW THE TYRANTS
stratagem.lore: In a storm of blade thrusts and bludgeoning strikes, enemy champions and commanders are laid low, leaving their troops in leaderless disarray.
stratagem.target: One Adeptus Astartes Infantry unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagem.effect: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [PRECISION] ability.

stratagem.name: FEINT AND THRUST
stratagem.lore: Retreating from the fight, these warriors lure their enemies on before swiftly turning the tables and hurling themselves into their now overextended foe.
stratagem.target: One Adeptus Astartes unit from your army.
stratagem.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back. If it is a Phobos or Scout Squad unit, it is also eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

stratagem.name: STUNNING FUSILLADE
stratagem.lore: From darkness and obscuring cover, Raven Guard battle‑brothers open fire as one, striking their unaware targets with precision fire.
stratagem.target: One Adeptus Astartes Infantry unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagem.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a ranged attack that targets an enemy unit that is more than 12" away, improve the Ballistic Skill and Armour Penetration characteristics of that attack by 1. If one or more enemy models are destroyed as a result of those attacks, select one of those destroyed models; that destroyed model’s unit must take a Battle‑shock test.

stratagem.name: RAPTORIAL VIGILANCE
stratagem.lore: The Raven Guard are swift to exploit the movements of their foes, whether to pursue their prey and complete the kill or to make use of an opportunity to fade once more from sight.
stratagem.when: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
stratagem.target: One Adeptus Astartes Infantry or Adeptus Astartes Mounted unit from your army that is within 9" of the enemy unit that just ended that move. You cannot target a unit that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagem.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D6", or up to 6" instead if it is a Phobos or Scout Squad unit.

stratagem.name: INTO DARKNESS
stratagem.lore: At the opportune moment, Raven Guard infiltration units slip away from battle, only to relocate ready to strike the foe again.
stratagem.when: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.
stratagem.target: Up to two Phobos and/or Scout Squad units from your army, or one other Adeptus Astartes Infantry unit from your army. You cannot target a unit that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagem.effect: Remove those units from the battlefield and place them into Strategic Reserves.
